zh.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn是Turstain Goz的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn是Turstain Goz的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

en.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn was born as the son of Turstain Goz. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn est né, fils de Turstain Goz. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn wurde, als Sohn von Turstain Goz geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn è nato il come figlio di Turstain Goz. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap CynfynはTurstain Gozの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn(은)는 Turstain Goz의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn nasceu filho de Turstain Goz. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn родился. Его отца звали Turstain Goz. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Cynfyn nació como hijo de Turstain Goz. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
